name: design-hub
description: Design Hub integration for Codex with confirmed read and write access over the local HTTPS MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read and update Design Hub workspaces, pages and specs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex access to Design Hub workspaces, views, table of contents, pages, search, confirmed page writes, and workspace assets through the Design Hub CLI local HTTPS streamable HTTP MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find the relevant Design Hub implementation plan.
Search Design Hub for architecture notes.
Read the Design Hub page before code changes.
Create a Design Hub page with an Orchestrator workflow.
Update this Design Hub page with a sequence diagram.
